title: Department Manager Vacancy at Vijay Sales - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Vijay Sales - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Vijay Sales in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vijay Sales:
Vijay Sales is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales!
